[[Izaac Farrell]] (son) }} }} '''Anthony Lloyd Farrell''' (born 17 January 1969) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. He played at representative level for [[England national rugby league team|England]], [[Wales national rugby league team|Wales]], and at club level for the [[Huddersfield Giants]], [[Sheffield Eagles]], [[Leeds Rhinos]], [[Widnes Vikings]] and [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]], as a {{rlp|pr}} or {{rlp|sr}} forward. ==Background== Farrell was born in [[Huddersfield]], [[West Riding of Yorkshire]], England. He is of Jamaican and Welsh descent.{{cite web | url=https://widnesvikings.co.uk/black-history-month-looking-back-on-5-players-who-helped-to-shape-widnes-history/#:~:text=Anthony%20Farrell&text=He%20represented%20both%20England%20and,working%20in%20the%20prison%20service. | title=Black History Month: Looking back on 5 players who helped to shape Widnes' history | date=October 2023 }} ==Playing career== Farrell played for [[Leeds Rhinos]] at {{rlp|sr}} in their [[1998 Super League Grand Final]] defeat by the [[Wigan Warriors]]. Whilst in his first year at [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] the sacking of [[Tony Anderson (rugby league)|Tony Anderson]] opened a new career for "Faz" as he was asked to become temporary coach until the end of the year. After saving the club from relegation the following season Farrell took the club within a whisker of a place in the grand final. Losing out to [[Castleford Tigers]]. The year after was less successful for Farrell though, after a poor series of results including a club record defeat by [[Hull Kingston Rovers]], "Faz" eventually lost his job. ==References== {{reflist}} {{Leeds Rhinos - 1999 Challenge Cup Final winners}} {{Wales squad 2000 Rugby League World Cup}} {{Halifax Panthers coaches}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Farrell, Anthony}} [[Category:1969 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:20th-century English sportsmen]] [[Category:21st-century English sportsmen]] [[Category:England national rugby league team players]] [[Category:English people of Jamaican descent]] [[Category:English people of Welsh descent]] [[Category:English rugby league coaches]] [[Category:English rugby league players]] [[Category:Halifax Panthers coaches]] [[Category:Halifax Panthers players]] [[Category:Huddersfield Giants players]] [[Category:Leeds Rhinos players]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Huddersfield]] [[Category:Rugby league props]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Sheffield Eagles (1984) players]] [[Category:Sportspeople of Jamaican descent]] [[Category:Wales national rugby league team players]] [[Category:Welsh people of Jamaican descent]] [[Category:Welsh rugby league players]] [[Category:Widnes Vikings players]] [[Category:Yorkshire rugby league team players]] {{Wales-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
